blocks.content: Select the tutorial data source and build a query that monitors request duration for the Quick Pizza application.

blocks.title: Select data source and build query

blocks.content: Select **grafanacloud-play-prom** as your data source. This is the tutorial Prometheus instance you installed in the previous step.

In the query editor, select a metric to monitor. Use the **Metric** dropdown to search for and select `quickpizza_server_http_request_duration_seconds_sum`.

This metric tracks how long HTTP requests take in the Quick Pizza application.
Click **Preview** to verify your query returns data. You should see one or more time series in the preview panel.
Your query selects the data to monitor. Next, you'll set the condition that determines when the alert fires.
